task_description: Deepen the AI-tools workflow content pillar with real, sourced fact sheets for widely-used AI writing/research/coding assistants: Claude (consumer plans), Perplexity Pro, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot. For each: current price, free-tier limit, verified_as_of date (today), and the primary source URL (official pricing page). This directly re-grounds content that previously stated a materially wrong Perplexity Pro price with no research backing -- verify that one very carefully against Perplexity's actual current pricing page.
next_action: Review the handoff and, if approved, continue through the existing execution flow.
